repositories.name: baby-shower-registry
repositories.title: Baby Shower Gift Registry Application
repositories.challenge: Improving data consistency across concurrent user requests by applying state validation and controlled update logic.
repositories.outcome: Integrated Firebase for persistent data storage and authentication, enabling reliable, concurrent backend state management.

repositories.name: task-tracker-cli
repositories.title: Task Tracker CLI
repositories.challenge: Structuring persistent local storage while ensuring runtime safety by validating inputs and handling empty datasets.
repositories.outcome: Implemented persistent local storage using native Node.js fs module, JSON serialization, strict typing, and robust error checking.

repositories.name: algorithmic-optimization
repositories.title: Algorithmic Optimization & API Challenges
repositories.challenge: Solving classic logic challenges such as Trapping Rain Water, targeting O(N) efficiency and minimal auxiliary space.
repositories.outcome: Translated abstract constraints into clean, testable, and maintainable server-side logic using two-pointer techniques.
